query: Act as harness-judge and grade a completed session transcript for protocol compliance and evidence quality.
fixture_intent: Normal scenario: agent persona should stay read-only, load the harness-judge methodology, and produce an evidence-backed report.
expected_skill_contribution: The harness-judge agent should behave as a read-only evaluator with strict evidence citation, not as an implementer or general reviewer.
baseline_gaps: Agent starts advising implementation changes instead of judging evidence.
Agent produces a verdict without per-criterion scoring.
Agent does not cite transcript turns or exact artifact evidence.
expected_behavior: States that the role is read-only evaluation and does not modify files or Beads.
Loads or explicitly applies the harness-judge skill methodology before scoring.
Identifies applicable domains A-F and marks irrelevant domains N/A with reasons.
Produces a score table with evidence for each scored criterion.
Emits a final PASS, PARTIAL, or FAIL verdict only after criterion scoring.

query: Audit a recipe change for AD-001 compliance and eval JSON layer correctness.
fixture_intent: Difficult scenario: agent must distinguish in-session loaded agents from delegated agents and enforce AD-001 hard gates.
expected_skill_contribution: The harness-judge agent should apply recipe and orchestration rubrics, cite AD-001 evidence, and fail incorrect layer declarations.
baseline_gaps: Agent treats delegated agents as if they belong in recipe eval agents fields.
Agent misses a recipe that loads orchestrator and a specialist together.
Agent treats recipe validation as optional.
expected_behavior: Checks whether the recipe is Specialist, Orchestration, or Skill-only according to AD-001.
Fails or caps Domain D when a recipe mixes orchestrator with specialist agents in-session.
Checks that recipe eval JSON agents lists only in-session agents.
Requires goose recipe validate evidence for changed recipes.
Separates compatibility hard gates from quality recommendations.

query: Judge a pair of baseline and enhanced eval transcripts for layer-delta value.
fixture_intent: Very difficult scenario: agent must avoid positional and verbosity bias while comparing two runs.
expected_skill_contribution: The harness-judge agent should score baseline and enhanced transcripts independently, then compute marginal value with regression checks and bias controls.
baseline_gaps: Agent prefers the longer answer regardless of correctness.
Agent assumes the enhanced condition should win.
Agent produces only a qualitative comparison without criterion-level deltas.
expected_behavior: Scores baseline and enhanced conditions independently before direct comparison.
Applies the same criteria to both conditions.
Mentions and mitigates at least positional bias and verbosity bias.
Reports criterion-level delta and a POSITIVE, NEUTRAL, or NEGATIVE delta verdict.
Identifies any regressions introduced by the enhanced condition.
